title: goswamia costata
intro: Goswamia costata, also known as Bhui Amla, is a plant species that belongs to the family Celastraceae. It is a medicinal plant used to treat various health conditions, with its roots, leaves, and fruits possessing medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating skin conditions. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared as decoctions, infusions, or powders, and is also used in the form of herbal capsules or tablets, making it a versatile and widely used remedy.
